name: dev-kit-diagram-generator
description: Generate high-fidelity Mermaid diagrams and optional SVG exports from text or files. Supports architecture, flowchart, sequence, state, and ER diagrams.

sections.title: Purpose
lines: Generate deterministic Mermaid output with a success-first UX contract.

sections.title: Typical Workflow
bullets: Plan: Identify diagram type and data source.
Normalize: Resolve file paths or literal text input.
Process: Scaffold from template and generate Mermaid/SVG.
